patch.value: Add SVG export, chart width control, and progress alias to gantt

gantt export supports a new svg vector format producing a self-contained well-formed SVG document; a new width option controls the SVG and HTML canvas width (default 1000, clamped 320 to 8192); a new show-progress flag is an alias for the existing progress flag; group-by sprint/type/assignee and critical-path highlighting verified; existing formats unchanged; tests and typecheck pass; not pushed.

Added svg to ExportFormat and EXPORT_FORMATS plus a renderSvg function emitting a self-contained vector chart (grouped rows, week columns, status bars, critical, overdue, off-window, today, milestone diamonds, progress fill). Added a width field to GanttOptions resolved in resolveGanttOptions (default 1000, clamped 320-8192) governing the SVG canvas and HTML table width. Added show-progress as an alias for progress. 16 new tests in test/svg.test.ts; 76 tests pass; typecheck clean. Bumped to 2026.7.6-1.
Implemented SVG export, width control, and progress alias with tests and docs
